Name: System Monitor
Description: Live CPU & memory graphs (Windows 10 Task Manager style) across a row of keys.

Actions.Name: System Monitor
Actions.Tooltip: Live CPU/RAM graph — place across a row of keys

Localization.SysmonHint: Place this action on several adjacent keys in a row to make one wide graph. Keep the same settings across the row. For both graphs, use a second row — with Auto, the top row shows CPU and the next shows RAM.
